phrases.text: We are going to walk through three acts.
a top-level section of the script.
The next block will make a point.
Segments let you organize long scripts
Each segment can have its own speed and emotion.
Notice the speed changed to 145 words per minute.
And the emotion shifted to concerned.
for the reader and the audience.
The teleprompter can adjust styling and pacing
The reader needs to feel the urgency.
is what makes a script engaging.
We return to a calm emotion
to give the audience space to breathe.
And we end on a motivational note.
That is how you structure a long TPS document.
